content.body: https://github.com/whatwg/html/issues/12441 - I've opened an issue to form a proposed agenda for this meeting. I'm happy to help facilitate this on-site but if there's specific process steps people would like to follow just let me know.

* https://github.com/whatwg/html/issues/12441 - I've opened an issue to form a proposed agenda for this meeting. I'm happy to help facilitate this on-site but if there's specific process steps people would like to follow just let me know.

On the specific date and time we have flexibility so can accomodate WHATWG needs on this.
